entities.description: Major pest of pearl millet, scientific name Heliocheilus albipunctella

entities.name: HABROBRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: Endogenous ectoparasitoid wasp used for biological control of the millet head miner

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: Use of a living organism to control a pest population

entities.description: Country where the parasitoid dispersal study was conducted

entities.description: The practice of releasing additional parasitoids into the field to enhance biological control

entities.name: PARASITISM
entities.description: The process by which Habrobracon hebetor attacks and develops within the millet head miner larvae

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: The death rate of millet head miner larvae resulting from parasitism

entities.description: The spatial movement and spread of parasitoids from the release sites
